sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109963" key="u(yikrate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ-κρᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n109963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rule aloft</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on high,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
